mapper.select: SELECT U.USER_ID AS userId, NVL(U.NICKNAME, U.USERNAME) AS name, U.PROFILE_FILENAME AS img, T.SELECTED_COUNT AS point, T.RNK AS rank FROM TBL_USER U JOIN ( SELECT USER_ID, COUNT(*) AS SELECTED_COUNT, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, USER_ID ASC) AS RNK FROM TBL_BOARD WHERE BOARD_TYPE = 'A' AND IS_SELECTED = 'Y' AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' GROUP BY USER_ID ) T ON U.USER_ID = T.USER_ID WHERE T.RNK <= #{limit} AND NVL(U.ENABLE, 1) != 0 ORDER BY T.RNK ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD B WHERE B.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND B.BOARD_TYPE = 'Q' AND B.PARENT_ID IS NULL

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RN, X.* FROM ( SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS id, B.TITLE AS title, -- CONTENT가 CLOB일 가능성 방어 (DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR) DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(B.CONTENT, 120, 1) AS preview, NVL(B.VIEW_COUNT, 0) AS views, NVL(B.LIKE_COUNT, 0) AS likes, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD A WHERE A.PARENT_ID = B.BOARD_ID AND A.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND A.BOARD_TYPE = 'Q' ) AS answers FROM TBL_BOARD B WHERE B.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND B.BOARD_TYPE = 'Q' AND B.PARENT_ID IS NULL ORDER BY NVL(B.VIEW_COUNT, 0) DESC, B.BOARD_ID DESC ) X WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE RN >= #{startRow}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD B WHERE B.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND B.BOARD_TYPE = 'Q' AND B.PARENT_ID IS NULL AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD A WHERE A.PARENT_ID = B.BOARD_ID AND A.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND A.BOARD_TYPE = 'A' ) = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USER WHERE NVL(ENABLE, 1) != 0

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RN, X.* FROM ( SELECT U.USER_ID AS userId, NVL(U.NICKNAME, U.USERNAME) AS name, U.PROFILE_FILENAME AS img, NVL(T.SELECTED_COUNT, 0) AS point, NVL(T.RNK, 9999) AS rank FROM TBL_USER U LEFT JOIN ( SELECT USER_ID, COUNT(*) AS SELECTED_COUNT, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, USER_ID ASC) AS RNK FROM TBL_BOARD WHERE BOARD_TYPE = 'A' AND IS_SELECTED = 'Y' AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' GROUP BY USER_ID ) T ON U.USER_ID = T.USER_ID WHERE NVL(U.ENABLE, 1) != 0 ORDER BY NVL(T.RNK, 9999) ASC, U.USER_ID ASC ) X WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE RN >= #{startRow}

SELECT tagName, cnt FROM ( SELECT H.BOARD_HASHTAG_NAME AS tagName, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, H.BOARD_HASHTAG_NAME ASC ) AS rn FROM TBL_BOARD B JOIN TBL_USER U ON U.USER_ID = B.USER_ID JOIN TBL_BOARD_ASPECT BA ON BA.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID JOIN TBL_BOARD_HASHTAG_LIST H ON H.BOARD_HASHTAG_ID = BA.BOARD_HASHTAG_ID WHERE B.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND B.BOARD_TYPE = 'Q' AND B.PARENT_ID IS NULL AND H.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND U.BRITH_DATE IS NOT NULL AND NVL(U.ENABLE, 1) != 0 AND TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, U.BRITH_DATE) / 12) BETWEEN #{minAge} AND #{maxAge} GROUP BY H.BOARD_HASHTAG_NAME ) WHERE rn <= 4 ORDER BY cnt DESC, tagName ASC
